headline: Iron Mountain Reshapes Growth Story With Data Center And ACT Logistics Deal
summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) is expanding its data center footprint, including the acquisition of ACT Logistics in Australia. To support this strategy, the company is increasing investment in global high growth regions as it adds digital infrastructure to its traditional storage services. This shift marks a material change in Iron Mountain's business mix, with data centers playing a larger role in revenue generation. Iron Mountain, long known for physical records storage, is increasingly...
